events.title: PM Summit 2026 (Virtual Conference)
events.description:
PM Summit 2026 — two-day virtual product management conference for which the recipient (Registrant: David Lee) is registered (Ticket: All-Access Pass; Order #: PMS-2026-12345). Event dates and primary schedule (all times Pacific Time, PT):

Day 1 — Tuesday, April 7, 2026
- 9:00 AM — Opening Keynote: “The Future of Product” (CEO, ProductCo)
- 10:30 AM — Track sessions begin (4 concurrent tracks)
- 12:00 PM — Lunch Break & Networking
- 1:00 PM — Afternoon Sessions
- 4:00 PM — Day 1 Closing Panel

Day 2 — Wednesday, April 8, 2026
- 9:00 AM — Day 2 Kickoff
- 9:30 AM — Workshop Sessions (hands-on)
- 12:00 PM — Lunch Break
- 1:00 PM — Afternoon Sessions
- 3:30 PM — Closing Keynote: “Building Products That Matter”
- 4:30 PM — Summit Concludes

Access information:
- Platform: Hopin (no download required)
- Access Link: https://hopin.com/events/pmsummit2026
- Your Login: david.lee@example.com
- Note: The platform opens 30 minutes before each day starts.

Additional details:
- All sessions recorded and available for 90 days.
- Build your personal schedule at pmsummit.com/schedule.
- Registrant and ticket details included above (keep for access/support).
